name: RPlog_What_We_Become
title: Two Exiles in Chalmun's Cantina
summary: In Chalmun's cantina in Mos Eisley on Tatooine, the fledgling Sith Dareus seeks out Lynae Cassius, the woman who was once like family to him during their shared Imperial service and joint treason. Over a bottle of whiskey, the two trade accusations of mutual abandonment: Lynae condemns Dareus for kneeling at Malign's feet, while he insists she betrayed the cause they once shared and will be haunted by her killer's nature. Their exchange swings between bitter cruelty and raw affection, touching on his abandoned wife, her refusal of Malign's offer, and her clinical promise that she could kill him in seconds with a hidden pathogen. Neither yields: Dareus warns her not to interfere with what he now serves, and Lynae declares she would kill him if he ever threatens those she loves. They part as estranged family on opposite sides, Lynae offering forgiveness and Dareus vowing to haunt her dreams until she follows her heart.
